_comment: Copy to <agent-task-folder>/.claude/settings.json, then open Claude Code in that folder. Console mode: the agent's whole world is this task folder. defaultMode acceptEdits + explicit Edit(*)/Write(*) allows mean no prompts on solution.py/best.py/records.md/reasoning.md; allow Bash(python:*) auto-runs the grader and python file ops. The deny rules still block reading outside the folder and reading grading/. A raw shell is not bound by tool denies - for a hardened run, use a separate OS account or container that cannot read grading/.
